name: Delete all Valhalla-imported rules from the Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: Deletes every rule that `sync-sigma-rules-catalog` created in this tenant, using the module's local id-map. Never touches user-created rules or Sekoia's verified catalog. Defaults to dry-run — set `confirm=true` to actually delete.

confirm.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.description: Must be true for rules to actually be deleted. When false, the action returns a report of what WOULD be deleted.
